argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const limit = {{ limit }} || 20; const app = document.querySelector('#app'); const pinia = app?.__vue_app__?.config?.globalProperties?.$pinia; const feedStore = pinia?._s?.get('feed'); if (!feedStore) return { error: 'Feed store not found', limit }; const feeds = feedStore.feeds || []; return { feeds, limit }; }

async (intermediate) => { const limit = intermediate.limit || 20; if (intermediate.error) return []; const feeds = intermediate.feeds || []; const results = feeds.map(item => { const noteCard = item?.noteCard || {}; return { id: item?.id || '', title: noteCard?.displayTitle || '', type: noteCard?.type || '', author: noteCard?.user?.nickname || '', likes: noteCard?.interactInfo?.likedCount || 0, url: 'https://www.xiaohongshu.com/explore/' + (item?.id || '') }; }); return { results, limit }; }
async (intermediate) => { const limit = intermediate.limit || 20; const results = intermediate.results || []; if (!results.length) return []; return results.slice(0, limit); }
